description: In 2017, influencers like Bella Hadid and Kendall Jenner promoted Fyre Festival as a luxury experience. The event turned into a disaster, leading to fraud charges for Billy McFarland and massive public outcry against the influencers involved.

key_events.description: Influencer marketing blitz creates massive hype.
Festival begins; attendees share photos of FEMA tents and cheese sandwiches.
Influencers delete promotional posts as legal scrutiny begins.
Documentaries emerge highlighting the deceptive nature of the promotion.

calibration_notes: Useful for calibrating the impact of influencer culpability in business fraud scenarios.
